<thinking>Intersection: elements in both A and B. 3 is in both. 4 is in both. Nothing else overlaps.</thinking>
A ∩ B = {3, 4}

<thinking>Union: all elements from both sets. No overlap.</thinking>
A ∪ B = {1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6}

<thinking>Intersección: elementos en ambos. azul está en ambos. verde está en ambos.</thinking>
A ∩ B = {azul, verde}
